[File: 'File Name: rest/middleware/metricsHandler.js -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: metricsMiddleware()] Can an unprivileged external user send a request to the metrics endpoint (metricsPath) that causes exporter.collect() to reject its promise (e.g., due to an internal OpenTelemetry error), and since there is no .catch() handler on the promise returned by exporter.collect().then(...), the rejection becomes an unhandled promise rejection that may crash the Node.js process, causing all subsequent metric exports to the mirror node to be missing?
